final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing hyper-realistic jewelry close-up photograph of a sapphire ring (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: must be hyper-realistic photography — exact camera and lens choice is yours
Composition: must be a close-up / macro shot of the ring
Subject: must include a sapphire ring with diamond setting (one)
Scene/backdrop: must be black velvet background
Lighting/mood: needs a light-play atmosphere showing fire and brilliance refracting inside the gemstone — exact light source arrangement is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include the refractive fire and brilliance inside the sapphire, with fine detail visible
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
